one_time_description: BC Housing forgivable loan received for construction of 66-unit housing project, recognized as deferred revenue
economic_notes: Nation operates business enterprises through Songhees Development Corporation and Songhees Development Limited Partnership. SDLP consolidates Songhees Nation Investment Corporation, Songhees Seafood and Steam Ltd (Songhees Events & Catering), and Songhees Tours Inc. Has equity investments in Xhamasung Holdings LP, Matullia Holdings LP, 1161742 BC Ltd and Salish Sea Industrial Services Ltd. Partnerships include S&S Victoria LP and S&S Bay Centre LP. 66-unit housing project under construction with BC Housing forgivable loan.
notes: Auditor firm name not fully stated — signed as 'Chartered Professional Accountants' in Nanaimo BC, firm name not explicitly identified. Nation adopted PS 3400 Revenue prospectively April 1, 2023 with no prior period restatement. Large deferred revenue item of $6,507,955 from BC Housing forgivable loan for 66-unit housing project — loan to be recognized over 23 years upon construction completion. Three entities consolidated (two trusts + minors trust). Seven entities accounted for under modified equity method. Prior year OSR includes $1,948,896 earnings from Nation business enterprises vs loss of $9,592 in 2024. Province of BC revenue dropped significantly from $5,749,416 to $550,577 year-over-year. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + Province of BC + CMHC + Other government funding = 9362208+1466785+550577+281470+1659391 = 13320431; OSR = 22992496 - 13320431 = 9672065.
